flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dyersburg State Community College fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (9.0% → 7.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dyersburg State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dyersburg State Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (51.3% → 63.4%).
